minimum_specification: Single rigid rotor with known radius and measurable moment of inertia
purpose: Test article for one full-revolution energy accounting
notes: Measure mass distribution or determine inertia experimentally

minimum_specification: One fixed permanent-magnet gradient section with documented angular span
notes: Record magnet grade orientation spacing and mounting geometry

purpose: Applies controlled pulse interaction to the gradient
notes: Mount with adjustable and measurable air gap

minimum_specification: Low-friction shaft with repeatable bearing preload
notes: Characterize coast-down losses before powered tests

minimum_specification: Current-limited driver suitable for EML50mm-24 voltage and pulse width
notes: Driver input and coil terminals must be measurable

minimum_specification: Stable supply with current limit and logging-compatible terminals
notes: Bus energy must be measured at driver input

minimum_specification: Index/angle signal with sufficient timing resolution for pulse windows

item: differential voltage probe or isolated ADC
minimum_specification: Range and bandwidth suitable for coil pulses

item: bus voltage divider or isolated ADC
current shunt with differential amplifier or Hall current sensor
notes: Bandwidth must capture pulse and flyback edges
Required if flyback recovery is claimed

item: shaft torque sensor or load cell with lever arm
notes: Must support static and dynamic calibration checks
Use for calibration and sanity checks

minimum_specification: Synchronized channels with adequate sample rate and timestamp accuracy
purpose: Records electrical mechanical and position data
notes: Sample fast enough to resolve pulse edges without aliasing

minimum_specification: Thermocouples or digital sensors for coil driver magnets and bearings
